column1: # 增量一驗證：版權保護畫面（開場靜態，證明 Big5 hi-res 渲染）
Please find this girl's photograph in your little black book, then complete her telephone number here:
column2: 請在你的小黑本裡找出這位小姐的照片，然後在這裡補完她的電話號碼：

column1: Sorry, but you need to spend more time staring at beautiful women! In order to play this game, you must have the original documentation. If you've lost your little black book, please telephone Sierra's Customer Support Department at the number printed on your disks.
column2: 抱歉，看來你得多花點時間欣賞美女才行！要玩這款遊戲，你必須擁有原版說明文件。如果你弄丟了小黑本，請撥打印在磁片上的號碼，聯絡 Sierra 客戶服務部。
